description:
This is a commemorative BLAST.tv Austin 2025 CS2 Major Championship Coin which tracks your progress throughout the event, provides full access to the Austin 2025 Pick'Em Challenge, Steam.tv chat flairs, coin challenges, and unlimited graffiti opportunities in-game for the duration of the event.

Upgrade your Austin 2025 Coin by completing coin challenges. Earn a Souvenir Token every time you upgrade your coin.
name: Austin 2025 Silver Coin
